description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On March 3rd (Tuesday), Iruma野 Agricultural Cooperative donated crossing flags and traffic safety umbrellas to support accident prevention efforts. The donation included 399 crossing flags (339 for children, 60 for parents) and 300 children's traffic safety umbrellas.

The safety umbrellas are designed with a transparent panel so children can see ahead clearly even while holding the umbrella.

Hanno City plans to use the donated crossing flags and safety umbrellas to promote traffic safety and prevent accidents at Hanno City elementary schools.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13213.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Iruma野 Agricultural Cooperative Donates Crossing Flags and Safety Umbrellas
